name: Heath Bar Pie
recipeInstructions:
1 In a medium bowl, mix together the crushed cookies, almond extract, and melted butter.
2 Press the mixture into a buttered pie pan to form a crust.
3 Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Bake the crust for 6-8 minutes, then let cool.
4 Freeze the crust for 15 minutes. Remove from the freezer and spread chocolate ice cream evenly onto the bottom of the crust.
5 Sprinkle peanut butter chips evenly on top of the ice cream. Freeze for 15 min., or until the ice cream is firm.
6 Spread vanilla ice cream evenly on top. Sprinkle chopped Heath bars on top; freeze.
7 To serve, pour Guadalupe Hot Fudge Sauce over the pie.
